name: Prefrontal — Calendar Sync (personal Google + work ICS)

nodes.name: Google Calendar (personal)
nodes.notes: Attach your Google OAuth2 credential. 'primary' = your personal calendar.

nodes.name: Get Work ICS
nodes.notes: Paste your shared/secret iCal feed URL (read-only).

parameters.jsCode:
// Collect all mapped events from both feeds into one sync batch.
return [{ json: { events: $input.all().map((i) => i.json) } }];

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "token": "PUSHOVER_TOKEN",
  "user": "PUSHOVER_USER",
  "title": "Prefrontal — double-booking",
  "message": "⚠️ {{ $json.conflicts }} overlapping commitment(s) on your calendar. Check /commitments/conflicts.",
  "priority": 1
}
